Acute Respiratory Infections in Travelers Returning from MERS-CoV–Affected Areas. We examined which respiratory pathogens were identified during screening for Middle East respiratory syndrome coronavirus in 177 symptomatic travelers returning to Ontario, Canada, from regions affected by the virus.
